productDisplayName: ANT Kids Girls Printed White Dress
description: Composition White frock with floral print, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with pink piping, bib on the front with ruffled piping, short puff sleeves with elasticated hems and a pleated panel at the hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Dry clean preferred Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on decorations Crafted from soft cotton fabric and with floral print, this pretty frock from ant is all set to offer absolute all-day comfort for your little girl. The pleated hem, and puffed and elasticated sleeves enhance the cute factor of your little princess. Add on cute sandals.
